title: [HW] Canonicalized assignment sequences to array create
body:
This transformation takes wires of array types set by assignments:

```
%wire = sv.wire : !hw.inout<array<2xi32>>
%elem0 = sv.array_index_inout %wire[%elemIdx0] : !hw.inout<array<2xi32>>, i1
sv.assign %elem0, %a : i32
%elem1 = sv.array_index_inout %wire[%elemIdx1] : !hw.inout<array<2xi32>>, i1
sv.assign %elem1, %b : i32
```
And coalesces the assignments into a single one using array create:

```
%arr = hw.array_create %b, %a : i32
sv.assign %wire, %arr : !hw.array<2ixi32>
```
